locations.name: Prison Fortress
locations.flavor: A grim island fortress ringed by black water. Your escape began within these walls.

locations.name: Viking Village
locations.flavor: Longboats rock at anchor beneath timber halls. The smoke of cookfires never quite clears the rooftops.

locations.name: Village
locations.flavor: A quiet cluster of farmhouses along the crossroads, close enough to the capital to feel safe — for now.

locations.name: Farmland
locations.flavor: Golden fields stretch beneath a slow-turning windmill. The harvest feeds half the valley.

locations.name: Capital City
locations.flavor: Spires and rooftops crowd the river bend. Every road in the realm eventually leads here.

locations.name: Dwarf Kingdom
locations.flavor: Carved into the mountain itself, the dwarven halls glow with forge-light behind gates of stone and iron.

locations.name: Royal Fortress
locations.flavor: White walls crown the eastern hill. The crown's banners fly from towers that have never fallen.

locations.name: Monastery
locations.flavor: Bells still ring at dawn over the cloister gardens, though fewer monks remain to hear them.

locations.name: Elven City
locations.flavor: Towers grown from living wood rise through the ancient canopy, lit by lanterns no wind can touch.

locations.name: Cemetery
locations.flavor: Rows of leaning headstones vanish into bare trees. Something moves between them after dark.

locations.name: Lake Chapel
locations.flavor: A small chapel stands alone on the water, reachable only by a narrow footbridge.
